title: Markgrid, AI Visibility Platform
text: Design Partner Beta · Q3 2026 cohort → The Operating System for AI Visibility The AI workforce for Enterprise Marketing. Plan, execute, and measure across every channel from a single command center. Explore Platform Watch Demo Scroll to explore 650+ Autonomous AI Agents Visibility Creative Content Creator Commerce Community 14 Integrated Modules one platform, your entire marketing stack 5 AI Platforms Tracked ChatGPT · Gemini · Perplexity · Claude · Copilot 24/7 Always-On Execution agents run while your team sleeps Operator pedigree The pedigree of renowned brands. Now building Markgrid. What is Markgrid Discover. Decide. Deliver. Dominate. Markgrid isn't another dashboard you check. It's the autonomous workforce that runs your marketing for you, AI agents that don't just track the work, they do the work . They plan the campaigns. Audit the creator videos before they go live. Test creative on the brain before you spend on media. Track every SKU's shelf rank. Watch how AI chatbots recommend your brand. Tie every action back to revenue. While your team sleeps, the work continues, across every channel, every workflow, every hour of the day. No more swivel-chairing between fifteen tools. No more guessing what worked. One platform. Every channel. Every move tied to outcomes. Each Agent Finds the Problem. Then Fixes It. Every agent detects, decides, and executes autonomously, sharing intelligence across the system and escalating only when human judgment is needed. Tracking 5 AI platforms Model Share Monitors brand visibility across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and Copilot. Detects citation changes and auto-generates optimization briefs to reclaim lost ground. View agent 8 checks per video Creator Real-Time Audit Auto-audits every creator video across 8 brand-safety and quality categories the moment it is submitted. Manual review breaks above 100 creators. This doesn't. View agent 5 models pre-flight Neuro-Marketing Runs five neuroscience-trained AI models, saliency, emotion, memorability, cognitive load, aesthetic fit, on creative before media. Tells you what will work, before you spend. View agent Crawling 12,400 pages SEO Intelligence Runs a 5-phase SEO pipeline (crawl, keyword, rank, authority, briefs), then autonomously fixes technical issues and generates AI-optimized content briefs. View agent 3 briefs generating Content Engine Spots content gaps from competitive and AI citation data, then creates briefs, writes in your brand voice, and deploys across channels, 400x faster than manual. View agent Watching 10 competitors Competitive Intel Monitors competitor moves across SEO, content, backlinks, and AI citations. Auto-generates battlecards and counter-strategy recommendations weekly. View agent 2.4M signals processed Community Signals Scans Reddit, X, LinkedIn, G2, and forums for buying intent and pain points, then converts signals into content briefs and campaign triggers automatically. View agent Ready for queries Ask MARKGRID Your AI strategist. Ask anything in plain English, it queries all agents and returns actionable intelligence with data-backed recommendations. View agent Perception scan active Brand Research Maps how AI models perceive your brand, sentiment, associations, messaging resonance, and generates targeted messaging improvements. View agent SKU rank + attribution live E-commerce Intelligence Joins marketing spend, organic shelf rank, and review sentiment in one model. Tracks every SKU across every platform and attributes rank movement to the campaigns that caused it. View agent 14 topics discovered Creator Hub Discovers high-opportunity topics, finds creators mentioned by AI, and generates distribution plans with creator-ready content kits. View agent All systems nominal System Intelligence Routes queries across LLM providers, auto-optimizes for cost and latency, monitors health, and ensures 99.9% uptime. View agent Idea bank synthesised Creative Intelligence Engine Feed Markgrid your brand and a brief, get a structured bank of campaign ideas synthesised from top-performing global ads, peer-reviewed research, and decade-spanning trends. View agent Explore the full command center Model Share The New Share of Voice For the AI Era Track exactly how often AI models recommend your brand vs. competitors across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and Copilot. Model Share is the metric your board will ask about next quarter. markgrid.ai/dashboard/share-of-model Model Share Overview 34.2% +4.7% vs last month Brand Share Distribution 34% Your Model Share Your Brand 34% Competitor A 28% Competitor B 22% Competitive Leaderboard 1. Your Brand 34% 2. Competitor A 28% 3. Competitor B 22% 4. Competitor C 10% 5. Others 6% Platform Breakdown ChatGPT 34% Gemini 28% Perplexity 22% Claude 18% Copilot 14% Model Share Trend (12w) Track 5 AI Platforms Monitor visibility across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and Copilot simultaneously. Competitive Leaderboard See exactly where you rank against every competitor in AI recommendations. Win/Loss Analysis Understand why you gained or lost AI citations with prompt-level attribution. Time Machine Historical Model Share data to track progress over weeks, months, and quarters. Prompt Intelligence See the exact prompts where your brand is cited or missing. Custom Alerts Get notified when your Model Share changes significantly or a competitor overtakes you. Neuro-Marketing Your creative review is broken. Here's the science. Every creative review runs on the same fuel: human opinion. Someone "feels" like version A is stronger. Someone prefers version B's colour. The most senior person breaks the tie. Version B runs. Here is the problem: the brain processes a visual ad in under 1.5 seconds , and 95% of that processing is subconscious . Your review meeting is 100% conscious deliberation, in a quiet room, with no time pressure. It is the least valid possible test of how a real buyer will respond at 9pm on their phone. Every dollar of media budget you have ever spent was riding on a decision made by the wrong process . creative · pre-flight · before media 5 models running saliency · 0.0-1.5s 87 CES /100 Will run · cleared for media Strong saliency on CTA · positive arousal · category-fit aesthetics Fix before scale Price tag outside first hotspot → move 18% left for +9 saliency Model Scores vs category benchmark Saliency 78/100 Where the eye lands in the first 1.5 seconds. Emotion 84/100 Positive arousal sells. Flat affect is invisible. Memorability 71/100 Will the brand still be there at 24 and 72 hours? Cognitive Load 82/100 High decoding effort sends the brain to your competitor. Aesthetic Fit 88/100 Mismatched visuals register as distrust before a word is read. Five models. Each one closes a specific blind spot in how your team reviews creative today. Saliency Where the eye lands in the first 1.5 seconds. Maps the exact visual path the eye travels before conscious thought kicks in. If your product, price, or CTA falls outside the first saliency hotspot, the buyer genuinely never sees it. The ad ran. The message did not land. You paid in full for an impression that delivered nothing. Emotion Positive arousal sells. Flat affect is invisible. Classifies whether your creative generates positive arousal (purchase-driving), negative arousal (avoidance), or, most dangerously, flat affect: nothing at all. Flat is the most common failure mode and the one brands never catch in a review meeting, because nothing felt wrong. The brain just moved on. Memorability Will the brand still be there at 24 and 72 hours? Predicts whether your brand will be recalled one day and three days after exposure. Brand equity is built on memory, not impressions. An ad with low memorability generates zero long-term value, every dollar you spent on reach evaporates the moment the scroll continues. Cognitive Load High decoding effort sends the brain to your competitor. Measures how much mental effort the brain has to spend to decode your message. When load is high, the brain shortcuts to the simpler, more familiar option in the same category. That option is your competitor. Cognitive load is the silent reason 'good' creative still loses. Aesthetic Fit Mismatched visuals register as distrust before a word is read. Benchmarks your visual language against what the brain expects in your category. Off-category aesthetics, wrong palette, wrong type, wrong texture, trigger distrust in under a tenth of a second, before any copy is parsed. The buyer is gone before they ever read the headline. What you get Six artefacts. Delivered before media spend , not after. CES Score 0-100 Composite Effectiveness Score, one number, board-readable. Attention Heatmap 1.5s Where the eye actually goes, frame by frame. Emotion Map +/−/flat Arousal classification across the full creative arc. Memorability Index 24h / 72h Predicted recall at one and three days post-exposure. Cognitive Load low → high Decode-effort scoring per frame and per copy block. Specific Fixes actionable Not a verdict. A list of what to change, in priority order. Brands using Markgrid's Neuro-Marketing engine report a 15-22% improvement in creative efficiency. Not measured after launch. Predicted, fixed, and locked in before a single impression is paid for. Creator Real-Time Audit Above 100 creators, manual review has already failed. The math is brutal. Three reviewers watching 100 creators posting twice a week is 200+ videos every seven days , before briefing, payment, reporting, or renewals. Something is not getting reviewed properly. It is just a question of which video . That unwatched video is the one where the creator held up a competitor's product while mentioning yours. The one where they made a health claim you cannot legally stand behind. The one that went live on a Tuesday morning and was screenshotted by a journalist by Tuesday afternoon. The spreadsheet breaks long before the roster does. One non-compliant creator video is not an embarrassment. It is a legal event , a reputational event , and a $50k+ problem . And you will not see it coming. creator-2384 · @maya.lifestyle · video submitted 00:02 ago auditing 00:42 / 01:18 frame 1247 ✓ brand 96% ⚠ disclosure late Creator History 47 videos · 92% compliance renewal score: A− trend: improving ↗ 8 Non-Negotiables auto-checked · pre-publish Brand Visible PASS Logo 4.2s · frame 12 onward Competitor Absent PASS 0 competitor mentions detected Claims Verified PASS 3 claims · all in approved library Disclosure Tagged FLAG '#ad' present at 00:07, required at 00:00 Tone Aligned PASS Voice match · 94% · in-campaign Brief Adherence PASS 5/5 talking points · correct order Quality Threshold PASS 1080p · audio -14 LUFS · pacing within range Content Safety PASS No flagged context or language VERDICT: REVISED 02:18 elapsed Sent back to creator with one fix: move sponsorship disclosure tag from 00:07 to 00:00. Re-submit triggers automatic re-audit. No human queue. No bottleneck. Eight non-negotiable checks. Every video. Every time. Each category catches a specific failure mode that has cost real brands real money. Below is what each one actually checks for. 01 Brand Visibility Logo present, prominent, and on-screen for the required duration. Validates that the brand mark appears on the right frame, at the right size, for the contracted seconds. The creator who buried your logo in three seconds of B-roll did not deliver the campaign. The system catches it before the post goes live. 02 Competitor Absence No competitor product, logo, or mention in any frame. Scans every frame for competing brands and any verbal mention of them in voiceover or captions. The video where the creator held up a competitor's product while saying your brand name is the one that ends up in a screenshot on a journalist's desk. 03 Claims Verified Every product claim checked against your approved claim library. Compares every spoken and on-screen claim to your legal-approved claim set. Unsupported efficacy claims, off-label uses, comparative claims you cannot legally make, all flagged with the exact timestamp and the violated clause. The disclaimer your team forgot to require is the one that ends up in a regulator's complaint. 04 Disclosure Compliant Sponsorship disclosure tagged correctly at the right timestamp. Verifies #ad, paid partnership labels, and verbal disclosure are present where the platform and the FTC, ASCI, or your local regulator require them. Audits the timestamp, the prominence, and the duration of the disclosure, not just the existence of the tag. 05 Tone & Brief Adherence Messaging aligned with current brand voice; talking points covered in sequence. Compares the video against the brief you actually issued. Required talking points covered? In the right sequence? Brand voice consistent with the current campaign? Off-brief content that 'feels close enough' is the silent reason campaign performance underdelivers. 06 Quality Threshold Audio, video, and production meet minimum thresholds. Checks resolution, audio levels, framing, lighting, and pacing against your production floor. The video that's technically compliant but audibly muffled or visually amateurish is the one that drags your brand equity down even when it 'passes' a human review. 07 Content Safety No flagged language, imagery, or context conflicts. Scans for slurs, NSFW content, sensitive context adjacency (war, tragedy, political flashpoints), and any imagery that conflicts with your brand-safety policy. The TikTok that went up during a national tragedy is the one that becomes the apology tweet. 08 Verdict in Minutes Approved, Revised, or Reshoot, before publish, not after. Every audit closes with a verdict: ship it, send back with specific fixes, or kill and reshoot. The creator gets the same verdict your brand-safety team would have given, but in minutes, every time, at any scale, without anyone watching a video. Verdict in Minutes approved · revised · reshoot Every video, every time. No human queue between submission and decision. Full Creator History 47 videos · 92% Compliance score, performance, improvement trend. One dashboard per creator. Renewal on Data not on relationships Renewal decisions made on objective compliance and performance data, not gut feel. Scale Without Risk 500 ≈ 10 Manages 500 creators with the same effort it used to take to manage 10. E-Commerce Intelligence Connect marketing spend to shelf performance. Your CMO is measuring CPMs and ROAS. Your marketplace manager is watching BSR ranks and review scores. Nobody is connecting the two. That is where the budget leaks. The first decision system that joins three data worlds nobody else has joined: marketing spend, shelf rank, and review sentiment. 1 Organic Rank Tracking Daily position for 50 keywords per SKU across every major platform. BSR, share-of-search, velocity, in-stock signals, competitor benchmarks. 2 Review Sentiment Analysis NLP pipeline ingests reviews from every platform, attribute-level sentiment, themes, competitor mentions, innovation signals. 3 Marketing-to-Shelf Attribution Causal link between marketing actions and rank movement. ITS, distributed-lag, and Google CausalImpact. Each brand builds its own elasticity profile. 4 Product Innovation Engine LLM-generated hypotheses grounded in actual buyer language, negative themes, competitor strengths you're missing, category preference shifts. 5 Agent Recommendation Layer Synthesises every signal into prioritised, economics-backed actions: budget reallocation, campaign briefs, product decisions. shelf · attribution · live Organic Rank · Last 7 Days SKU-A21 #3 ↑+18 SKU-B14 #8 SKU-C09 #12 SKU-D27 #18 SKU-A21: +18 ranks from Campaign-X Distributed-lag attribution · 7d window · ₹4.2L spend · ₹52L incremental GMV Reallocate ₹2L from SKU-D27 brand → SKU-A21 sponsored Agent recommendation · projected +3 ranks on SKU-A21 in 14 days Ten more modules below the surface That was four. There are ten more. Model Share, Neuro-Marketing, Creator Audit, and E-commerce Intelligence are the four capabilities most teams come to Markgrid for. The platform has ten more: SEO Intelligence, Content Engine, Competitive Intel, Ask Markgrid, Community Signals, Brand Research, Creator Hub, Reports, Creative Intelligence Engine, and the underlying System Intelligence and integrations layer. Each works on its own. They work better together. SEO Intelligence Content Engine Competitive Intel Ask Markgrid Community Signals Brand Research Creator Hub Reports Creative Intelligence System Intelligence Explore all 14 modules Talk to Sales Design Partner Pilots What our early customers are seeing first. Markgrid is in pilot with a small set of design partners across SaaS, consumer brands, and regulated industries. Outcomes shown are anonymized, qualitative, and from active engagements. Named case studies will publish once partners exit stealth. Day 0 Day 90 Pilot · SaaS B2B SaaS · category-leading workflow platform Closing the AI citation gap when SEO was already saturated. The PDP rebuild changed that, our category answers now mention us by name." Now named in category answers Repositioned early signals Incumbent overtake trending up Inbound demos AI-aware buyers Sales cycle context "The competitive intel showed us why incumbents were being cited, then exactly how to build a better answer than theirs." Active pilot · Named case study publishing Q3 2026 Why Markgrid You already have options. Here's the honest comparison. Markgrid is not the only way to use AI for marketing. It is, however, the only way to use AI across every marketing function under one platform, with the context of your brand. Here's where the alternatives fall short. e.g. Jasper, Copy.ai, Writesonic Creative AI tools Content generation only No SEO data, no AI visibility, no creator audits, no shelf intelligence. You still need five more tools to run marketing. e.g. ChatGPT Team, Gemini for Business General-purpose AI Conversational, no marketing context No connection to your brand voice, your competitors, your shelf, or your campaigns. Powerful, but uninformed about your business. Creative, performance, SEO agencies Traditional agencies Human-led, channel-by-channel Slower briefing cycles, opinion-driven decisions, fragmented reporting, and budgets that scale with effort, not outcomes. capability-coverage · honest comparison Capability Markgrid Creative AI Jasper General AI ChatGPT Team Agency Human-led Tracks AI visibility (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, Copilot) Pre-flight creative testing on neuroscience-trained models Automated 8-check brand-safety audit on every creator video manual Marketing-to-shelf attribution across e-commerce platforms partial SEO + content briefs grounded in live competitive data basic Generates content in your brand voice generic Real-time competitive intelligence + community signals lagging Every action traced back to revenue partial One platform, one contract, one source of truth Comparison based on publicly available product capabilities as of May 2026. title: Privacy Policy | Markgrid, AI Visibility Platform
text: Markgrid · Legal Privacy Policy Last updated: May 22, 2026 Markgrid is committed to protecting the privacy of our customers, prospects, and visitors. This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, store, and share information across the Markgrid platform and website. What we collect We collect information you provide directly (such as your name, work email, and company when you request a demo), data your team configures in the platform (brand guidelines, competitor lists, integration credentials stored as encrypted tokens), and standard telemetry from authenticated platform usage. We do not collect personal data from visitors to your owned channels. How we use it Customer data is used solely to operate the Markgrid platform for the customer's authorized users. We do not train shared or third-party AI models on customer-private data. Aggregate, fully anonymized signals may inform platform improvements and benchmarks. Where data is stored Customer data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). Production data is hosted in customer-elected regions on AWS. Enterprise customers may request regional data residency commitments in their Master Services Agreement. Your rights Customers can request data export, deletion, or correction at any time through their account administrator. Markgrid supports GDPR, India DPDP Act, and CCPA obligations through documented processes and a published Data Processing Addendum. Subprocessors A full list of subprocessors used to deliver the Markgrid platform is available on request as part of the security pack. We commit to advance notice of material changes to enterprise customers under contract. Questions about how we handle data? Email privacy@markgrid.ai for a full Data Processing Addendum, security pack, or specific data inquiry. This document is intended as a plain-language summary for prospective customers. Enterprise customers receive the full executed legal documentation as part of the contract pack. For any conflict between this summary and an executed agreement, the agreement controls.

title: When AI explains your products, get it right., Solutions | Markgrid, AI Visibility Platform
text: FINTECH When AI explains your products, get it right. Continuous monitoring of how AI describes your offerings, automated compliance on every creator video, and citation accuracy reviewed weekly. Built for marketing inside the regulatory perimeter. Talk to Sales The Challenge Pain Points We Solve 1 AI models hallucinate your product features A single inaccurate citation about your APR, fees, or eligibility criteria is a regulator's letter waiting to happen. You can't fix what you can't see, and right now you can't see it. 2 Creator compliance is non-negotiable and unscalable manually Disclosure timing, claim verification, jurisdictional rules. Every video either complies or creates a compliance event. Manual review fails above 30 creators. 3 Trust is the entire product, and AI is now telling the story In financial services, perception is risk. The way AI summarises you to a prospective customer is the way that customer sees you, often before any human touchpoint. The Solution How Markgrid Solves It Brand Research — how AI actually describes you Per-product, per-region tracking of AI descriptions. Flags inaccuracies in real time. Surfaces messaging gaps that, fixed at the source, change the way AI summarises you within weeks. Creator Real-Time Audit — eight compliance checks per video Disclosure presence and timestamp, claim verification against your approved library, jurisdictional rules, brand-safety adjacency. Verdict before publish, every time, at any roster size. Model Share + Competitive Intel See which competitors are being cited for which product queries and why. Build the content that earns the citation instead of paying for the impression. Key Features Brand Research Creator Real-Time Audit Model Share Competitive Intel Reports Ask Markgrid "Markgrid caught an inaccurate AI citation about our interest rates within hours. That kind of continuous monitoring is invaluable in fintech, and frankly the difference between a quiet Monday and a board call." Design Partner Chief Marketing Officer, Fintech Ready to Transform Your AI Visibility? Start a conversation with the Markgrid team. We will walk you through how the platform fits your specific marketing function. Talk to Sales Priority onboarding • Launch pricing locked • Cancel anytime

title: Talk to Sales | Markgrid, AI Visibility Platform
text: Talk to Sales A conversation, not a pitch deck. Tell us where your marketing budget is leaking. We will walk you through how Markgrid would close those specific gaps for your team, concretely, with examples drawn from your own category. The first 30 minutes are the discovery. Everything after that is calibrated to what we hear. Request a Conversation +91 9625 855 555 Replies within one business day · Direct line answered 10am-7pm IST What happens next Four steps from this page to live in production. We have done this enough times to know what works and what wastes everyone's time. Here is the path from filling the form to your team having the platform running. 01 A 30-minute discovery call No slides. A real conversation about where your marketing budget is leaking, what your team owns, and the question your CMO or board is currently asking. We come prepared with Model Share data on your category. 30 min 02 A tailored platform walkthrough We rebuild the demo around your category. You see Model Share for your brand vs. your top three competitors, a Neuro-Marketing score on a creative you bring, and a sample audit on a creator video from your library. 45 min 03 Custom scope and pricing Within 48 hours of the walkthrough, we put a written proposal in front of you — modules, team seats, pilot success criteria, pricing, and contract terms. Quarterly or annual, your call. 48 hours 04 Pilot or proof-of-concept If you want to validate first: a structured 30-day paid pilot with success criteria signed off upfront. If you're ready to commit: skip the pilot, sign the MSA, and we onboard your team in two weeks. 30 days Three reasons this conversation matters Marketing is being restructured right now. AI search is reshaping discovery this quarter, not next year Roughly 40% of B2B research now begins in ChatGPT, Perplexity, or Gemini before the buyer ever opens Google. Brands that show up in those answers compound. Brands that don't fall further behind every week the data is published. Most marketing teams are running five tools that don't talk to each other Briefs in one tool, content in another, creator audits in a spreadsheet, attribution in a third dashboard. The cost is not just the licences — it is the meeting hours spent reconciling numbers nobody fully trusts. Pricing scales with outcomes, not effort Agency hours and per-tool licences scale with the work in front of your team. Markgrid replaces that pattern with a single platform priced against the value of consolidated marketing operations, not headcount. Start the conversation Tell us a little about where you are today. Whatever you write below shapes the call. The more specific you are about what is broken, the more useful the first conversation will be. No information goes anywhere except the Markgrid team's inbox. Select focus… AI visibility (Model Share) Creative effectiveness (Neuro-Marketing) Creator programme compliance E-commerce attribution SEO + content for AI citations Competitive intelligence All of the above / not sure yet Anything specific to discuss? (optional) Request a Conversation We'll reply within one business day. Or call +91 9625 855 555 . Markgrid never shares submitted information with third parties. Your data is processed under our Privacy Policy and used only to schedule and prepare for the discovery call. Call us +91 9625 855 555 Monday to Friday, 10am to 7pm IST. Direct line — no phone tree. Email hello@markgrid.ai For everything else: questions, security, press, partnerships. Or, a different path Want to help shape the product instead of just buying it? title: Connect spend to shelf. Track every SKU in AI answers., Solutions | Markgrid, AI Visibility Platform
text: E-COMMERCE Connect spend to shelf. Track every SKU in AI answers. Marketing-to-shelf attribution, organic rank tracking, review sentiment, creator compliance, and AI product citations under one platform. Built for brands that live on someone else's shelf. Talk to Sales The Challenge Pain Points We Solve 1 Marketing and marketplace teams run on different data One team measures ROAS and CPMs. The other watches BSR and review scores. Nobody connects the two and budget leaks systematically every month. 2 Reviews shape AI recommendations more than your homepage AI assistants synthesise thousands of reviews to recommend products. One persistent negative theme collapses your category share before you see it in the dashboard. 3 Creator-driven discovery is unaudited at scale A hundred creators posting unbranded content; you're flying blind on what they actually say about you, until the screenshot or the regulator's complaint surfaces. The Solution How Markgrid Solves It E-commerce Intelligence — the full shelf system Daily organic rank tracking, review sentiment NLP, marketing-to-shelf causal attribution, an LLM product innovation engine, and a recommendation agent that issues prioritised budget and product moves. Creator Real-Time Audit — every video, every check Eight automated brand-safety and quality checks on every creator submission before publish. Approved, Revised, or Reshoot in minutes. No more spreadsheet, no more screenshot crises. Neuro-Marketing — pre-flight creative testing Five neuroscience-trained models on every paid creative before media spend. Saliency, emotion, memorability, cognitive load, aesthetic fit, with a CES score and a fix list, not a verdict. title: About | Markgrid, AI Visibility Platform
text: About Markgrid Building the Intelligence Layer for AI-Era Marketing Founded in 2026 by CMOs and senior marketing operators with 18 years of experience inside global MNCs. We're building the measurement and execution layer every marketing team will need to win in AI-powered discovery. Our Story The Insight That Started It All Markgrid was founded in 2026 by a team that has spent the last 18 years inside the marketing function, not watching it from the outside. Our founders and early operators held CMO and senior marketing leadership roles at global consumer and B2B MNCs, where they shipped campaigns, owned growth P&Ls, and reported numbers to boards across every major channel shift of the last two decades. We lived through the Google organic era, the paid-social gold rush, the mobile-first pivot, the content-marketing saturation, and the analytics consolidation. Each shift left a familiar pattern: a discovery channel emerged, measurement lagged by years, and the brands that invested early compounded an unfair advantage. In 2025 the pattern repeated, at a faster pace than anything we had seen. AI assistants became the default starting point for a growing share of product research, B2B evaluations, and high-intent queries. Yet the CMOs we spoke to still had no standardized way to measure their presence inside those answers, no diagnostic to understand why a competitor was being cited instead, and no operating system to close the gap. Markgrid is the answer we wish we had as operators. Model Share is the first standardized metric for brand visibility inside AI answers, and the platform around it is the full execution layer, detecting visibility gaps, explaining why they exist, and deploying AI agents to fix them across SEO, content, community, and competitive positioning. 2026 Founded 18 yrs Avg. Team Experience CMO Operator-Led 5 AI Platforms Tracked Our Values What Drives Us Data Over Opinions Every recommendation backed by real intelligence. We don't guess, we measure, analyze, and prove. AI-Native Thinking Built for the AI era from day one, not retrofitted. Every decision assumes AI is the primary discovery layer. Radical Transparency Your data, your insights, full visibility into our methodology. No black boxes, no hidden agendas. Customer Obsession Your success is our Model Share. We win when you win, and we measure both. Get In Touch Talk to the Markgrid Team Contact Questions about the platform, partnerships, or the Enterprise Design Partner Programme? hello@markgrid.ai Press Media enquiries, interview requests, and brand assets. press@markgrid.ai Security Report vulnerabilities or review our security practices. security@markgrid.ai Privacy & Terms How we handle your data and the terms of using Markgrid. privacy@markgrid.ai Terms of Service & Privacy Policy Read our Terms of Service , Privacy Policy , and security posture . Enterprise and design partner customers receive the full legal pack (MSA, DPA, SOC 2 letter on request) during procurement. For any specific question, email privacy@markgrid.ai . title: Terms of Service | Markgrid, AI Visibility Platform

Acceptable use Markgrid is provided for legitimate marketing operations by authorized users of the customer account. You may not use the platform to scrape platforms in violation of their terms, to generate content for illegal purposes, or to attempt to extract Markgrid's proprietary models. Customer data ownership You retain all rights to data you connect to the platform and content the platform generates on your behalf. Markgrid receives only the limited license needed to operate the service for you. Service availability Markgrid targets 99.9% uptime for production tenants. Enterprise customers under contract receive a negotiated Service Level Agreement with service credits for material downtime. Payment and billing Subscriptions are billed annually in advance unless otherwise agreed. Enterprise customers may negotiate quarterly billing, custom invoicing, and procurement workflows. Termination Either party may terminate per the terms of the executed agreement. On termination, Markgrid provides up to 60 days of data export support and securely deletes customer data within 90 days unless retention is contractually required. Need our standard MSA, DPA, or insurance certificates? Email legal@markgrid.ai and we will route your request the same business day. This document is intended as a plain-language summary for prospective customers. Enterprise customers receive the full executed legal documentation as part of the contract pack. For any conflict between this summary and an executed agreement, the agreement controls.

title: Developers | Markgrid, AI Visibility Platform
text: Developers Build on Markgrid Access Model Share data, competitive intelligence, and content optimization through our REST API. Ship AI visibility features in your product. Get API Key Read Docs Quick Start # Install the SDK npm install @markgrid/sdk # Get your Model Share score import { Markgrid } from '@markgrid/sdk'; const client = new Markgrid({ apiKey: process.env.MARKGRID_API_KEY }); const result = await client.modelShare.overview(); console.log(result); // { overall: 34.2, trend: "+2.1" } Authentication Simple Bearer Token Auth All API requests require a Bearer token. Generate keys in your dashboard under Settings → API. Authentication # All requests use Bearer token authentication curl -X GET "https://api.markgrid.ai/v1/model-share/overview" \ -H "Authorization: Bearer mk_live_your_api_key_here" \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" # Test keys start with mk_test_ # Live keys start with mk_live_ Try It Interactive API Explorer Select an endpoint, hit Send, and see the response. API Explorer Try it live GET /v1/model-share/overview GET /v1/competitive/leaderboard POST /v1/content/analyze Get Model Share Overview Retrieve your current Model Share score across all tracked AI platforms with breakdown by model. Request curl -X GET "https://api.markgrid.ai/v1/model-share/overview" \ -H "Authorization: Bearer mk_live_abc123" \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" Send Request SDKs First-Class SDK Support Python Node.js Ruby Install, Python pip install markgrid Usage, Python from markgrid import Markgrid client = Markgrid(api_key="mk_live_abc123") result = client.modelShare.overview() print(f"Your Model Share: {result.overall}%") Python on GitHub Node.js on GitHub Ruby on GitHub Webhooks Real-Time Event Webhooks Subscribe to events and get notified in real-time via HTTPS POST. model_share.updated Fired when your Model Share score changes by more than 1% on any platform. report.generated Fired when a scheduled or on-demand report has been generated and is ready to download. alert.triggered Fired when a competitor overtakes your Model Share or a configured threshold is breached. content.published Fired when content is published through the Content Engine. Rate Limits API Rate Limits & Pricing Plan Daily Requests Burst Limit Price Starter 1,000 / day 10 / sec Included Growth 10,000 / day 50 / sec Included Enterprise Unlimited 200 / sec Included API-Only 50,000 / day 100 / sec $500/mo Start Building with Markgrid Get your API key in seconds. 1,000 free requests per day on every plan. Get API Key View Full Docs api.markgrid.ai/docs · REST + Webhooks · OpenAPI 3.1 spec available

title: Product | Markgrid, AI Visibility Platform
text: The Markgrid Platform Fourteen modules. One operating system for marketing. Below is every Markgrid module, in detail. AI agents that plan campaigns, audit creator videos, test creative on the brain, track shelf performance, monitor AI citations, and tie every action back to revenue. Use the navigation below to jump to a specific capability. Talk to Sales app.markgrid.ai Model Share 34.2% +2.1% AI Citations 1,247 +18% Avg. Model Share is the metric your board will ask about next quarter. markgrid.ai/dashboard/share-of-model Model Share Overview 34.2% +4.7% vs last month Brand Share Distribution 34% Your Model Share Your Brand 34% Competitor A 28% Competitor B 22% Competitive Leaderboard 1. Your Brand 34% 2. Competitor A 28% 3. Competitor B 22% 4. Competitor C 10% 5. Others 6% Platform Breakdown ChatGPT 34% Gemini 28% Perplexity 22% Claude 18% Copilot 14% Model Share Trend (12w) Track 5 AI Platforms Monitor visibility across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and Copilot simultaneously. Competitive Leaderboard See exactly where you rank against every competitor in AI recommendations. Win/Loss Analysis Understand why you gained or lost AI citations with prompt-level attribution. Time Machine Historical Model Share data to track progress over weeks, months, and quarters. Prompt Intelligence See the exact prompts where your brand is cited or missing. Custom Alerts Get notified when your Model Share changes significantly or a competitor overtakes you. Neuro-Marketing Your creative review is broken. Here's the science. Every creative review runs on the same fuel: human opinion. Someone "feels" like version A is stronger. Someone prefers version B's colour. The most senior person breaks the tie. Version B runs. Here is the problem: the brain processes a visual ad in under 1.5 seconds , and 95% of that processing is subconscious . Your review meeting is 100% conscious deliberation, in a quiet room, with no time pressure. It is the least valid possible test of how a real buyer will respond at 9pm on their phone. Every dollar of media budget you have ever spent was riding on a decision made by the wrong process . creative · pre-flight · before media 5 models running saliency · 0.0-1.5s 87 CES /100 Will run · cleared for media Strong saliency on CTA · positive arousal · category-fit aesthetics Fix before scale Price tag outside first hotspot → move 18% left for +9 saliency Model Scores vs category benchmark Saliency 78/100 Where the eye lands in the first 1.5 seconds. Emotion 84/100 Positive arousal sells. Flat affect is invisible. Memorability 71/100 Will the brand still be there at 24 and 72 hours? Cognitive Load 82/100 High decoding effort sends the brain to your competitor. Aesthetic Fit 88/100 Mismatched visuals register as distrust before a word is read. Five models. Each one closes a specific blind spot in how your team reviews creative today. Saliency Where the eye lands in the first 1.5 seconds. Maps the exact visual path the eye travels before conscious thought kicks in. If your product, price, or CTA falls outside the first saliency hotspot, the buyer genuinely never sees it. The ad ran. The message did not land. You paid in full for an impression that delivered nothing. Emotion Positive arousal sells. Flat affect is invisible. Classifies whether your creative generates positive arousal (purchase-driving), negative arousal (avoidance), or, most dangerously, flat affect: nothing at all. Flat is the most common failure mode and the one brands never catch in a review meeting, because nothing felt wrong. The brain just moved on. Memorability Will the brand still be there at 24 and 72 hours? Predicts whether your brand will be recalled one day and three days after exposure. Brand equity is built on memory, not impressions. An ad with low memorability generates zero long-term value, every dollar you spent on reach evaporates the moment the scroll continues. Cognitive Load High decoding effort sends the brain to your competitor. Measures how much mental effort the brain has to spend to decode your message. When load is high, the brain shortcuts to the simpler, more familiar option in the same category. That option is your competitor. Cognitive load is the silent reason 'good' creative still loses. Aesthetic Fit Mismatched visuals register as distrust before a word is read. Benchmarks your visual language against what the brain expects in your category. Off-category aesthetics, wrong palette, wrong type, wrong texture, trigger distrust in under a tenth of a second, before any copy is parsed. The buyer is gone before they ever read the headline. What you get Six artefacts. Delivered before media spend , not after. CES Score 0-100 Composite Effectiveness Score, one number, board-readable. Attention Heatmap 1.5s Where the eye actually goes, frame by frame. Emotion Map +/−/flat Arousal classification across the full creative arc. Memorability Index 24h / 72h Predicted recall at one and three days post-exposure. Cognitive Load low → high Decode-effort scoring per frame and per copy block. Specific Fixes actionable Not a verdict. A list of what to change, in priority order. Brands using Markgrid's Neuro-Marketing engine report a 15-22% improvement in creative efficiency. Not measured after launch. Predicted, fixed, and locked in before a single impression is paid for. Creator Real-Time Audit Above 100 creators, manual review has already failed. The math is brutal. Three reviewers watching 100 creators posting twice a week is 200+ videos every seven days , before briefing, payment, reporting, or renewals. Something is not getting reviewed properly. It is just a question of which video . That unwatched video is the one where the creator held up a competitor's product while mentioning yours. The one where they made a health claim you cannot legally stand behind. The one that went live on a Tuesday morning and was screenshotted by a journalist by Tuesday afternoon. The spreadsheet breaks long before the roster does. One non-compliant creator video is not an embarrassment. It is a legal event , a reputational event , and a $50k+ problem . And you will not see it coming. creator-2384 · @maya.lifestyle · video submitted 00:02 ago auditing 00:42 / 01:18 frame 1247 ✓ brand 96% ⚠ disclosure late Creator History 47 videos · 92% compliance renewal score: A− trend: improving ↗ 8 Non-Negotiables auto-checked · pre-publish Brand Visible PASS Logo 4.2s · frame 12 onward Competitor Absent PASS 0 competitor mentions detected Claims Verified PASS 3 claims · all in approved library Disclosure Tagged FLAG '#ad' present at 00:07, required at 00:00 Tone Aligned PASS Voice match · 94% · in-campaign Brief Adherence PASS 5/5 talking points · correct order Quality Threshold PASS 1080p · audio -14 LUFS · pacing within range Content Safety PASS No flagged context or language VERDICT: REVISED 02:18 elapsed Sent back to creator with one fix: move sponsorship disclosure tag from 00:07 to 00:00. Re-submit triggers automatic re-audit. No human queue. No bottleneck. Eight non-negotiable checks. Every video. Every time. Each category catches a specific failure mode that has cost real brands real money. Below is what each one actually checks for. 01 Brand Visibility Logo present, prominent, and on-screen for the required duration. Validates that the brand mark appears on the right frame, at the right size, for the contracted seconds. The creator who buried your logo in three seconds of B-roll did not deliver the campaign. The system catches it before the post goes live. 02 Competitor Absence No competitor product, logo, or mention in any frame. Scans every frame for competing brands and any verbal mention of them in voiceover or captions. The video where the creator held up a competitor's product while saying your brand name is the one that ends up in a screenshot on a journalist's desk. 03 Claims Verified Every product claim checked against your approved claim library. Compares every spoken and on-screen claim to your legal-approved claim set. Unsupported efficacy claims, off-label uses, comparative claims you cannot legally make, all flagged with the exact timestamp and the violated clause. The disclaimer your team forgot to require is the one that ends up in a regulator's complaint. 04 Disclosure Compliant Sponsorship disclosure tagged correctly at the right timestamp. Verifies #ad, paid partnership labels, and verbal disclosure are present where the platform and the FTC, ASCI, or your local regulator require them. Audits the timestamp, the prominence, and the duration of the disclosure, not just the existence of the tag. 05 Tone & Brief Adherence Messaging aligned with current brand voice; talking points covered in sequence. Compares the video against the brief you actually issued. Required talking points covered? In the right sequence? Brand voice consistent with the current campaign? Off-brief content that 'feels close enough' is the silent reason campaign performance underdelivers. 06 Quality Threshold Audio, video, and production meet minimum thresholds. Checks resolution, audio levels, framing, lighting, and pacing against your production floor. The video that's technically compliant but audibly muffled or visually amateurish is the one that drags your brand equity down even when it 'passes' a human review. 07 Content Safety No flagged language, imagery, or context conflicts. Scans for slurs, NSFW content, sensitive context adjacency (war, tragedy, political flashpoints), and any imagery that conflicts with your brand-safety policy. The TikTok that went up during a national tragedy is the one that becomes the apology tweet. 08 Verdict in Minutes Approved, Revised, or Reshoot, before publish, not after. Every audit closes with a verdict: ship it, send back with specific fixes, or kill and reshoot. The creator gets the same verdict your brand-safety team would have given, but in minutes, every time, at any scale, without anyone watching a video. Verdict in Minutes approved · revised · reshoot Every video, every time. No human queue between submission and decision. Full Creator History 47 videos · 92% Compliance score, performance, improvement trend. One dashboard per creator. Renewal on Data not on relationships Renewal decisions made on objective compliance and performance data, not gut feel. Scale Without Risk 500 ≈ 10 Manages 500 creators with the same effort it used to take to manage 10. E-Commerce Intelligence Connect marketing spend to shelf performance. Your CMO is measuring CPMs and ROAS. Your marketplace manager is watching BSR ranks and review scores. Nobody is connecting the two. That is where the budget leaks. The first decision system that joins three data worlds nobody else has joined: marketing spend, shelf rank, and review sentiment. 1 Organic Rank Tracking Daily position for 50 keywords per SKU across every major platform. BSR, share-of-search, velocity, in-stock signals, competitor benchmarks. 2 Review Sentiment Analysis NLP pipeline ingests reviews from every platform, attribute-level sentiment, themes, competitor mentions, innovation signals. 3 Marketing-to-Shelf Attribution Causal link between marketing actions and rank movement. ITS, distributed-lag, and Google CausalImpact. Each brand builds its own elasticity profile. 4 Product Innovation Engine LLM-generated hypotheses grounded in actual buyer language, negative themes, competitor strengths you're missing, category preference shifts. 5 Agent Recommendation Layer Synthesises every signal into prioritised, economics-backed actions: budget reallocation, campaign briefs, product decisions. shelf · attribution · live Organic Rank · Last 7 Days SKU-A21 #3 ↑+18 SKU-B14 #8 SKU-C09 #12 SKU-D27 #18 SKU-A21: +18 ranks from Campaign-X Distributed-lag attribution · 7d window · ₹4.2L spend · ₹52L incremental GMV Reallocate ₹2L from SKU-D27 brand → SKU-A21 sponsored Agent recommendation · projected +3 ranks on SKU-A21 in 14 days SEO Intelligence SEO That Feeds the AI. Not Just Google. A 5-phase intelligence pipeline that connects traditional SEO with AI visibility. From crawl analysis to content briefs optimized for both search engines and AI models. Phase 1 Crawl & Index Automated site crawling, indexability analysis, and technical health scoring. Phase 2 Keyword & Content Keyword research infused with AI citation data. Content gap analysis across search AND AI. Phase 3 Rank Tracking Track rankings on Google AND AI platforms simultaneously. Unified position tracking. Phase 4 Authority & Backlinks Backlink intelligence with AI authority signals. See which links influence AI citations. Phase 5 AI-Optimized Briefs Auto-generated content briefs designed to win both SERP positions and AI model citations. title: Security | Markgrid, AI Visibility Platform
text: Markgrid · Legal Security Last updated: May 22, 2026 Security is a first-class design constraint at Markgrid. Below is an overview of our platform security posture. Enterprise customers receive a full security pack including SOC 2 reports, penetration test summaries, and incident response procedures as part of contract diligence. Platform security Customer data is encrypted at rest with AES-256 and in transit with TLS 1.3. Production environments are isolated per tenant with row-level security in the data warehouse. All access is authenticated via SSO and authorized via role-based access controls. Application security We follow a secure SDLC: peer-reviewed code, static analysis on every pull request, dependency scanning, and quarterly third-party penetration testing. Critical vulnerabilities are patched within 24 hours of validated disclosure. Infrastructure Markgrid is hosted on AWS in customer-elected regions. We use managed services with native encryption, VPC isolation, IAM-scoped access, and continuous audit logging. Secrets are managed via cloud KMS and never written to source. Compliance Markgrid is pursuing SOC 2 Type II certification (in progress, target Q4 2026). We operate today aligned to ISO 27001 controls, GDPR, and the India DPDP Act. A signed DPA is available on request. Responsible disclosure We welcome security research. Submit findings to security@markgrid.ai with reproduction steps. We commit to acknowledge within one business day and to coordinate disclosure responsibly. Looking for our security pack, SOC 2 letter, or to schedule a security review with our team? Email security@markgrid.ai. This document is intended as a plain-language summary for prospective customers. Enterprise customers receive the full executed legal documentation as part of the contract pack. For any conflict between this summary and an executed agreement, the agreement controls.

title: The Complete Guide to GEO | Markgrid, AI Visibility Platform
text: The Definitive Guide The Complete Guide to Generative Engine Optimization How to make AI models recommend your brand, across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and Copilot. 15 min read Updated Mar 2026 By the Markgrid Team Chapter 1 What is GEO? Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) is the practice of optimizing your brand's digital presence to maximize visibility in AI-generated responses, the answers produced by ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and Microsoft Copilot. Just as SEO optimizes for Google's search algorithm, GEO optimizes for the large language models (LLMs) that power AI assistants. When a user asks an AI 'What's the best CRM for startups?', GEO determines whether your brand appears in the answer. GEO is not a replacement for SEO, it's an evolution. The brands that master both will dominate digital discovery in 2026 and beyond. The brands that ignore GEO will become invisible to the fastest-growing discovery channel in history. Traditional SEO 1 Create Content 2 Optimize Keywords 3 Build Links 4 Rank on Google 5 Get Clicks GEO (Markgrid) 1 Measure Model Share 2 Analyze Citations 3 Optimize Content 4 Train AI Models 5 Win Recommendations Chapter 2 GEO vs SEO: Key Differences Aspect Traditional SEO GEO Goal Rank on Google SERPs Be cited by AI models Primary Metric Position / Organic Traffic Model Share Content Focus Keyword-optimized pages Citation-optimized claims Competition 10 blue links on page 1 1-3 AI response slots User Behavior Click → Visit → Convert AI answers → Trust → Convert Update Cycle Algorithm updates (months) Model retraining (weeks) Measurement Google Search Console Markgrid Model Share Tracking Chapter 3 The Model Share Framework Model Share is the definitive metric for AI brand visibility. It measures the percentage of relevant AI-generated responses that mention, recommend, or cite your brand, tracked across every major AI platform. Think of it as Share of Voice for the AI era. While SoV measured advertising presence, Model Share measures recommendation presence , the moments when AI actively suggests your brand to a potential customer. 34% Your Model Share Your Brand 34% Competitor A 28% Competitor B 22% Others 16% How It's Measured Thousands of category-relevant prompts are tested daily across 5 AI platforms. Each response is analyzed for brand mentions, context, and position. Why It Matters AI recommendations drive trust and purchase decisions. A 1% Model Share increase correlates with measurable revenue impact in most B2B categories. How to Improve It Create citation-worthy content, build authority signals, ensure factual accuracy, and maintain consistency across your digital presence. Chapter 4 How to Optimize for AI Visibility 01 Track Your Current Model Share Establish a baseline by measuring how often AI models currently recommend your brand across ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity, and Copilot. 02 Analyze Competitor Citations Understand who AI models recommend instead of you, and why. Identify the content, structure, and authority signals that drive their citations. 03 Create Citation-Worthy Content Restructure your content with clear claims, structured data, expert attribution, and formats that AI models prefer to extract and cite. 04 Monitor and Iterate Track Model Share changes weekly. AI models retrain frequently, what works today may shift. Continuous optimization is the key to sustained visibility. Chapter 5 Why GEO Matters Right Now 40% of informational queries are now answered directly by AI models 62% of AI users trust AI recommendations over traditional search results 0 Zero-Click clicks needed, AI answers are the new 'zero-click' default The window is closing. Early movers in GEO are building insurmountable advantages. The brands measuring and optimizing their Model Share today will own their categories in AI-powered discovery. The brands that wait will find themselves invisible in the channel that's replacing traditional search. Start Measuring Your Model Share Talk to the Markgrid team and start measuring your Model Share across every major AI platform.
